# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Deploy

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_script:
        description: 'Path to the build script to execute'
        required: true
        type: string
      deploy_command:
        description: 'Deployment command to execute'
        required: true
        type: string

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on:
      - self-hosted
      - datacenter
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Run custom build script
        run: |
          chmod +x "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"
          "${{ github.event.inputs.build_script }}"

      - name: Run deployment command
        run: ${{ github.event.inputs.deploy_command }}
